notes: everything works fine out of the box, no issues
title: Brothers in Arms: Earned in Blood™

notes: Game runs fine and without any issues just like Road to Hill 30, I highly recommend you to increase the FOV to make the game more playable on modern machines. Check for a guide online, user game config is located in steamapps/compatdata/19800/drive_c/users/steamuser/applicationdata/Gearbox software.
title: Brothers in Arms: Earned in Blood™
